response.global_analysis: The audio consists entirely of English dialogue from the Hololive Justice members presenting their merchandise and announcing a concert. There are no vocal songs. I have prioritized transcribing the spoken dialogue with precise timestamps matching the vocal delivery. On-screen text was used to ensure correct spelling of product names (e.g., 'Sergeant Smokey Multi Case', 'Otomo'). Subtitles are segmented logically based on pauses and speaker changes to ensure readability and sync.
